name: DentistrySimulationModule
description: Formal specification for Dentistry Simulation (LPD), Cryptographic Biotelemetry (ZKP), and MIRA Animator

contracts.name: LPDModel
postconditions: strain is updated according to non-linear viscoelastic anisotropic model

contracts.name: ZKPTelemetryVerifier
preconditions: patient_confidentiality is preserved (no raw patient identifiers in public inputs)
invariants: zero_knowledge_leakage == true (no patient private data in proof)

error_catalog.description: Applied stress exceeded the mechanical rupture limit of the periodontal ligament (4.5 MPa)
Biotelemetry data checksum mismatch or forensic tampering detected
Mechanical collision between reconstructed teeth surfaces detected during animation
